title: Ocugen Valuation Analysis Amid Clinical Progress and Going Concern
text: Valuation analysis of Ocugen Inc shows company trading at significant premium to biotech peers despite going concern risks. Recent convertible notes offering and equity financing dilute shareholder base but extend cash runway into 2028. Key valuation drivers: OCU400 potential peak sales for broad RP indication estimated 500M+ annually if approved. OCU410 geographic atrophy opportunity estimated 2B+ peak sales. OCU410ST Stargardt disease market significant despite smaller patient population. Three-BLA strategy by 2028 could unlock substantial value if successful. Key risks: Heavy dilution from multiple financing rounds. Going concern risk if clinical trials encounter setbacks. Competitive landscape with other gene therapy approaches. Regulatory approval timelines uncertain. Current valuation reflects significant binary risk-reward profile typical of late-stage biotech companies.
